sizing_rule.note: Position size reduces by ~13-15% per additional simultaneous position. Single position: $40k per 1000 range; Two positions: $32k per 1000 range (20% reduction); Four positions: $24k per 1000 range (40% reduction). Maintains constant portfolio risk control as market exposures increase.

source_rule_text: Position size should be reduced as the number of simultaneous market exposures increases, maintaining constant risk control across portfolio complexity.
